assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters throughout, mentions upgrade sequence in the Key Notes section, and includes specific channel validation commands

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions no node pool management, mandatory resource requests, and includes specific kubectl commands to check for missing resource requests

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific kubectl command for checking deprecated API usage: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' and mentions GKE deprecation insights

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'ALL containers have resource requests set (mandatory in Autopilot)' with a specific kubectl command to check for missing requests, and mentions it again in the Critical Items section

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Includes checks for PDBs with kubectl command, mentions no bare pods requirement, and includes terminationGracePeriodSeconds limits for graceful shutdown

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific gcloud and kubectl commands to verify control plane and node versions are at 1.32.x

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health section with commands to check deployments, pods status, StatefulSets, and jobs

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly states dev clusters should upgrade first, includes dev environment validation section, and mentions waiting for dev validation before prod upgrades in Key Notes

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: The response mentions having 'good lead time' and 'next month's upgrade' but does not specifically mention the ~1 month advance notice from checking GKE release schedules beyond the 72h notification
Includes comprehensive monitoring items in both pre-upgrade (baseline metrics, monitoring active) and post-upgrade (metrics collection, error rates, latency) sections

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response mentions maintenance windows and exclusions but does not proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions, focusing instead on cluster-level maintenance windows
